{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232018400C46B7C4EB71D5CBECCC"}"},"total":1860},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7515455933653762840","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一口气刷到最新章节，十分推荐
全文轻松向，读起来很舒服
到目前为止，无任何暧昧行为，主角与男女配角的互动正常（不要有cp啊喂
…呃剩下以后补充：P
接下来是对部分印象深刻的人物感受（仅个人
祭司
第一印象：穿黑袍的帅气冷酷神秘的强大存在（你家乌鸦借我耍耍呗）
之后：班味十足（？的随叫随到屑打工仔（你面对魔女真的好从心，不愧是上司的压迫感🤟）
总之请多给他点剧情
李神
第一印象：好吊的lD（快说你是不是反派
之后：忠诚的犬（等等，你不会反水对吧
总之《论隐藏任务的魅力》
夏·资本家·玩家收割机·隐藏“NPC”·残害同盟·尔
鹅鹅鹅
艹编辑长评一不小心被我删了啊啊啊（懒得重写了
总结：太少了，不够看","text_exts":[{"e":256,"s":253,"text":"NPC","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=NPC&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774268320D5CBECCC%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227515455933653762840%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227501084651524459544%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22NPC%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1749831833,"group_id":"7501084651524459544","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"为什么偏要10个字以上","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwonqWDsVfZvqLkbEjbLgAqojG40nqEylGCOJRJNmxmm","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1c91ead52d2b4712a337525690947e9c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792218&x-signature=3yLJ7NzgY9wDEarxdP2bmvz5ZWI%3D","user_id":"3719005250527680","user_name":"起飞的砖"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3719005250527680","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7501084651524459544","book_info":{"abstract":"【第四天灾】+【新手村boss】+【反套路】+【折磨玩家】

“神谕”游戏发售当天夜晚，因熬夜猝死的夏尔在睁开双眼后发现自己成为了游戏中一名“新手村boss”。
为了保证自己能够存活下来，他只能每天默默潜水玩家论坛，观看他们新出的攻略。
玩家:“这片副本区域有条密道，我们可以从这里悄悄潜入进去。”
夏尔:“收到!”
玩家:“艹，谁往这条密道里撒毒了!”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b58a828e6734def10905a7450bd1ce45","author":"扶风起墨","author_id":"","book_id":"7501084651524459544","book_name":"我们亡灵法师是这样的","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":830,"name":"升级流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=830&name=升级流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":855,"name":"第四天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=855&name=第四天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7501084655441936920","read_count":"62500","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1175141"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"577","tags":"游戏体育,穿越,网游,升级流,第四天灾,副本","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d779d18a823210930eb24431d591cf83~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779452320&x-signature=mBe7ezIvYW2g6vqYWOmZfsoUzp8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3092272003156516","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"120"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232018400C46B7C4EB71D5CBECCC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":68,"forwarded_count":0,"l 并非数值设定严谨，玩家有反抗能力的网游文，到200多章为止的故事主剧情就是主角作为boss去各地割玩家/本地魔物韭菜，至今无感情线，主角专心事业。
